Wait, another angle: since I'm already earning well (20th), maybe I should focus on increasing order count by aligning with busier times. So, perhaps starting at 10:00 AM is okay, but extending into later evening to catch more orders when others are finishing up.

But if I work until 9 PM, that's the same as before. Maybe instead, starting a bit earlier would help capture an initial rush.

Hmm, after considering all these factors, I think slightly adjusting my start time to 9:00 AM and ending at 8:00 PM could be beneficial. This gives me an extra hour in the morning but ends an hour earlier in the evening. Alternatively, keeping the same duration but shifting later.

Wait, maybe that's not necessary. Perhaps just a small tweak would suffice. Maybe start at 10:00 AM as before and finish at 8:00 PM instead of 9:00 PM, giving me an extra hour in the early evening when orders might peak more.
